problem: High customer churn rate in B2B SaaS product

root_causes.cause: No dedicated CSM for <50 users accounts
Pricing not competitive for SMB segment

recommendations: Assign CSM to all accounts regardless of size
Build top 10 requested integrations in next quarter

evidence.claim: 60% of churned customers cite poor onboarding
Average time-to-value is 45 days vs industry 14 days
